## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm run test`
- [ ] `npm run security:scan`
- [ ] No secrets, API keys, or private media committed
- [ ] Licence notes remain accurate (Remotion ≠ MIT / OSI)
- [ ] Docs updated if commands, env, or setup changed
